posts.text:
Tom Brady has completely disassociated himself from the Patriots organization. @dannykanell had an interesting theory on how Robert Kraft wronged him.

Video

Bam Adebayo's 83-point game is a disgrace to NBA legacy. I can't believe Pat Riley's organization was involved with this.

Video

More I think about it, Adam Silver should disallow Bam’s 83. Fine the Heat. Give the Wizards the victory. Punish all involved. Heat take an L, tanking Wizards take a W, and Bam loses the record. Problem solved.

Woke up this morning in the wrong mindset. Some sort of power surge crashed my studio. I started whining about how this could happen on a day with Bam 83 and Maxx Crosby. Gave no thought that it crashed on the day Rob Chickering, our tech guru, was in town. Rob fixed it in 5 minutes. Perfect day to have the problem. God is good all the time if we just have the eyes to see it.

How about everyone just stops saying it. Like no one should say it. Putting it in songs and putting it in your regular vernacular for people to quote or emulate really muddys up your strange social “rules” about segregating language.


Insane Cope (@InsaneCope)






— https://nitter.net/InsaneCope/status/2030680131006841147#m
Basketball was my first love. My dad took me and my brother to Pacer games in the ABA. Basketball has been destroyed.  Bam scored 83. My mind can’t handle this.

Bam's 83 points make Sosa & McGwire look legit.

The NBA is in shambles. The Hawks should re-announce Magic City Night to take attention away from Bam diminishing Kobe and Wilt. NBA should be embarrassed.

Bam scoring 83 points is not a good look for the NBA. It undermines the integrity, intensity, and structure of the game. This would be the equivalent of Rocky Bleier rushing for 2,000 yards. There's no resistance.

Maxx Crosby did not pass his physical today, per sources. 

The Ravens get their first round picks back.

I can’t believe what I’m seeing. 

People are acting as if a strip club… a damn strip club is a beacon of the community and a major staple of a city’s culture!!! 

Do you not gather how bad that is for a city coined the black Mecca of the USA?!

Sad.

JD Vance & Erika Kirk?
Marco Rubo & Erika Kirk?

American political strategy must continue to honor our lord and savior, Charlie Kirk.

I admired Charlie Kirk. Shed real tears when he was assassinated. 

The idolatry must end.

This bigotry is taught in the home, celebrated in popular culture, and reinforced in the church. It's powered by victimhood mentality and worship of black mothers. Sickening.


Queen Natalie (@TheNorfolkLion)

This video really upset me. The poor boy clearly didn’t want to fight, but the other kid was determined to be a bully. 

This is exactly the problem, we’ve become too complacent and just accept this kind of behaviour. Especially among young people, who feel they can’t or won’t speak up or

Yes, I did. I wanted to make a point about idolatry and its many forms. 

We need to spend more energy and focus on honoring the legacy of Jesus Christ than his flawed disciples. Peter, Paul, James, Andrew, Matthew, etc would all tell you this.


Indian Correspondent (@CurryAlert)

You brought Erika Kirk into the conversation...



— https://nitter.net/CurryAlert/status/2031455292844601693#m

Charlie Kirk's legacy is those 2 kids, not the Defense Department.


Joe G (@EastEndJoe)

Erika Kirk will help advise the Defense Department on issues affecting the academy.




— https://nitter.net/EastEndJoe/status/2031195068158067074#m

This is heartbreaking and sick.


Queen Natalie (@TheNorfolkLion)

This video really upset me. The poor boy clearly didn’t want to fight, but the other kid was determined to be a bully. 

This is exactly the problem, we’ve become too complacent and just accept this kind of behaviour. Especially among young people, who feel they can’t or won’t speak up or do anything without immediately being labelled racist.

We need to FIGHT BACK!

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/TheNorfolkLion/status/2031346

YouTube.com/jasonwhitlock



Oli (@OliverQuickle)

@WhitlockJason how does one find your pod with groce today



— https://nitter.net/OliverQuickle/status/2031393866411044884#m
